After her arrest, the baby was safely returned to her father. Now, Broussard's murder case is being turned into a lifetime movie called "Stolen Baby: The Murder of Heidi Broussard."

snippet.title: Oregon Voter Digest December 15, 2023 show 1
snippet.description:
Host Bruce Broussard discusses various political issues and upcoming elections in  Oregon, with a focus on Portland.
 Earl Blumauer's retirement as the congressional representative from Oregon's 3rd district is acknowledged, and his background in political activism, including his support for LGBTQ rights, alternative energy sources, healthcare reform, Federal education support, and marijuana legalization, is highlighted.
The show also introduces John Toran, who will lead the discussion on various issues and contribute to the program's efforts to provide education on important political matters.

snippet.title: Iron Man 3 Unmasked | Marvel | Iron Man Behind the Scenes
snippet.description:
In "Iron Man 3," we see the culmination of the journey of Tony Stark, which began with the entire Marvel Cinematic Universe. This film is not only a follow-up to "The Avengers" but also a unique story with more complexity, character exploration, and ambition than any other movie in the franchise. In this video, we witness the creative process behind the film's thrilling action sequences, such as Tony's suit connect sequence, where he tries to control the suit pieces but ends up flying uncontrollably. We see how the team designed Tony's workshop and the mansion, the latter of which was built on a gimbal to create an earthquake-like effect. We also learn how Pepper Potts, Tony's love interest, got to wear the suit in this movie, which was a great idea from Shane Black, the director. Overall, this video offers a fascinating glimpse into the making of "Iron Man 3" and the creativity and hard work behind it. It offers notes from Black, producer Kevin Feige, stunt coordinator Markos Rounthwaite, visual effects supervisor Christopher Townsend, executive producers Stephen Broussard, Louis D’Esposito and Victoria Alonso, production designer Bill Brzeski, associate producer Mitch Bell, stunt double Trevor Habberstad, and actors Robert Downey, Jr., Gwyneth Paltrow, Stephanie Szostak, James Badge Dale, Don Cheadle, and Guy Pearce.

snippet.title: Oregon Voter Digest December 2, 2023 Show 2
snippet.description:
Host Bruce Broussard and local denizen John Toran emphasizes the importance of addressing the issues facing the city of Portland and Multnomah County, with a focus on effective leadership and community involvement. 
The speakers emphasize the importance of addressing specific problems and engaging the community in finding solutions. They mention ongoing surveys to gather community feedback on issues like the bottle bill, homelessness, and the city's direction. 
The team also touches upon the need for inclusivity and understanding different perspectives, as well as the roles and responsibilities of the mayor, city manager, and bureau chiefs. 
The conversation revolves around the importance of having meetings and encouraging moderates to have their voices heard in politics. The team encourages viewers to share the survey link and attend district meetings to contribute to productive discussions.

00:00:00 Intro
00:05:00 John Toran discusses the challenges of leadership in times of negative momentum
00:10:00  the hosts discuss the importance of focusing on specific issues and involving the community in finding solutions.
00:15:00 Discussion on education disruptions and the city's direction
00:20:00 the discussion revolves around the impact of economic status on people's views on policing and the importance of addressing the root causes of criminal behavior, such as lack of employment and affordable housing.
00:25:00 the speaker discusses the need for inclusivity and understanding different perspectives in addressing various issues in Oregon.
00:30:00 Speakers discussion Charter reform, new City Government Administration organization and the cost of City Hall remodel.
00:35:00 Speakers discuss the new City Councils district offices.
00:40:00  the discussion revolves around the roles and responsibilities of the mayor, city manager, and bureau chiefs in the city of Portland
00:45:00  the speakers discuss the importance of all districts being involved in the process of improving Portland's reputation, particularly in addressing the conflict between dealing with homelessness and drug addiction issues and maintaining a positive tourist experience.
00:50:00 the speaker discusses the upcoming elections and how business may exert influence through creating slates of candidates
00:55:00 The speakers discuss the importance of moderate political voices being a part of the political discord in Portland, Oregon.

The team also touches upon the need for inclusivity and understanding different perspectives, as well as the roles and responsibilities of the mayor, city manager, and bureau chiefs. 
The conversation revolves around the importance of having meetings and encouraging moderates to have their voices heard in politics. The team encourages viewers to share the survey link and attend district meetings to contribute to productive discussions.

snippet.title: Bruce Campbell Returns! LIVE from CyphaCon : Jon Russo Zero-G-Love : Damian Broussard 501st : Chip L
snippet.description:
Source:
https://www.spreaker.com/user/twigradio/2023-04-02-twig-live-at-cyphacon

This week we were Live in Lake Charles at CyphaCon! Our Thanks to all the Staff, Volunteers, and of course Garrett Manuel for an amazing event and weekend!
While at CyphaCon we got a chance to sit down with our extended Con Family and talk about the things that make going to conventions a Blast, and that's FAN GROUPS! First out the gate we chat with Jon Russo from Zero-G Love : A Macross Fan Group. We talk about his passion for Macross, and dig into the History of Macross and Robotech, and the copyright wars.
Get more info our join the group here -->  https://www.facebook.com/groups/zeroglove/
Then we are joined by Damian Broussard of the 501st Legion, and Chip Lechner of Dagobah Base to talk about all the great charity events and troops they do across the State, Country, and the Globe.We find out about Coin Challenges, and look forward to Star Wars Celebration in London. To join the Rebel Scum or the 501st check them out here ---> https://www.facebook.com/The501stLegion
https://www.facebook.com/dagobah.base
Finally we welcome back to the show, the one and only Bruce Campbelll. He's going on a 22 State Tour to host "Last Fan Standing" and Rewatch the Moldy Goldies. We also talk about the new movie coming out soon "Evil Dead Rise", and then quiz him on how many gallons of blood was used in the Evil Dead Franchise.To get mote info or Tickets go here -->https://www.bruce-o-rama.com/
All that and more on The Week in Geek with D Squared. Sunday nights at 7pm on WRNO.com and the Free iHeart Radio App. If you want to be on the show or just leave a comment, go to Newstalk 99.5 WRNO or The Week in Geek on the iHeart Radio App and Click the Red Microphone Button to leave a 30 second message! Make sure you Click the SUBSCRIBE button so you never miss a new episode. Follow us on Twitter @TWIGradio and The Week in Geek on Instagram. 4/2/23

Small Tornado on a Parking Lot

There are Four Major Kinds Of Storms: Thunderstorms, Tornadoes, Hurricane
How Do Tornadoes Form ?
Tornadoes form when warm, humid air collides with cold, dry air. The denser cold air is pushed over the warm air, usually producing thunderstorms. The warm air rises through the colder air, causing an updraft. The updraft will begin to rotate if winds vary sharply in speed or direction

snippet.title: 48 Minutes "Giannis: A Deeper Dive"
snippet.description:
Giannis Antetokounmpo did his first ever podcast with our "48 Minutes" crew of Ross Geiger, Bruce Bernstein, & Michael "World B" Freer. It was literally "The Podcast Heard Round the World." Giannis responded to every important question with honesty and thoughtfulness. The attention this show brought us has been overwhelming and we wanted to take a few minutes to share some thoughts on Giannis and also on what his comments mean moving forward.
========
0:00 … Hello and Welcome … Ross introduces the panel … teases our content

0:28 … Bet OnLine live commercial read

1:15 … Opening discussion on Giannis and how his presence has set off an avalanche of attention for the show …

1:30 … Bruce credits Ross for getting Giannis … Reaction to seeing ourselves on ESPN’s NBA Today

2:12 … Giannis made news on the show, especially about his future in Milwaukee …

2:48 … World B’s reaction to the passion that Giannis showed in answering our questions … lots of fans in Milwaukee are feeling a bit nervous

3:43 … Bruce discusses how much civic pride the city of Milwaukee has for Giannis and how he is recognizable around the world as a “one name” person … and while he’d like to stay in Milwaukee if the team is competitive, he does have options.  Ross chimes in on the reasons he feels Giannis and Milwaukee are a good fit.

5:53 … World B sizes up the Bucks situation, singling out Jrue Holiday and the other veterans and understands that their championship window won’t stay open indefinitely.

6:50 … Ross tees up a discussion of Giannis’ comments about the NBA champion not being the “World Champion.”  This was a very controversial take by Giannis and we examine the pros and cons of his position.

8:50 … Bruce feels the American fans and the International fans are clearly divided on the topic.  There are other leagues around the world that could lay claim to calling themselves “World Champions,” but don’t.

10:12 … Ross points out that Giannis never speaks without thinking first and Ross agrees with him on the issue, even though he was previously on the fence.

10:59 … World B agrees that part of the issue is the American fans’ attitude and he points out that it’s now up to the US to send a team to the Olympics to back up the boasting.

11:38 … Hakeem Olajuwon discussion and why Giannis has always been Bruce’s “Hakeem 2.0”  Giannis also broke the news that he’d be working out with Hakeem before the season starts, which resonated “big time” around the hoop world.

13:41 … World B on the excitement in Milwaukee over the Hakeem/Giannis future workout

14:15 … Ross on comments from fans … we love them … keep them coming

14:48 … Thoughts on the growth of our listeners from around the globe …

16:22 … Ross expresses his feeling that helping hoop fans get to know Giannis through this show has been gratifying for him.

17:10 … Next week’s guest will be Mike Brown, the head coach of the Sacramento Kings and we examine some of his accomplishments and why he is such a winning individual.  Everyone discusses what they hope to learn from Coach Brown.

23:41 … Ross asks for listeners to send us questions … Bruce and World B share their social media handles for listeners questions and Ross adds his at the end.

26:30 … Bye and see y’all next time

 

TRT 27:00

snippet.title: Cheryl Miller on the '84 Olympics with Pat Summitt | Knuckleheads Podcast | The Players’ Tribune
snippet.description:
Cheryl Miller describes what it's like to win gold in the 1984 Olympics in Los Angeles. She reflects on her relationship with legendary coach Pat Summitt and how they overcame some tense moments to pull out a gold medal win for Team USA.
